title: 2026 tax organizer
content: 2026 TAX ORGANIZER (preparer-ready, hand off March 2027). Residency change: TX to CO effective 2026-07-01; Colorado-source income period 2026-07-01 to 2026-12-31. Income: Stonebridge Healthcare W-2 (PGY-2), plus any moonlighting income routed through Gusto. Deductions: student-loan interest paid against $218,340 principal (~$600/mo accrual), CO state tax withheld, qualifying moving items from July 2025 relocation. Papa-routed Xero items captured in separate appendix (NOT Dana's personal return). Gaps to close: final W-2, 1098-E, moonlighting 1099 if issued.

title: Cardiac sarcoidosis case report draft
content: Atypical Presentation of Cardiac Sarcoidosis in a Hispanic Patient. Draft with Dr. Sarah Whitmore. Submission target 2026-10-31. Figures pending co-author review. Do not collide with the Guadalajara trip window Jan 25-Feb 1 2027.

content: IRB application for the Latino health-disparities chart-review study. Deadline 2026-11-03. Status: final internal review with Dr. Whitmore's group before submission.
